zh.lifeSummary: 當Beatrix Driby於大約1275年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏斯特拉特費爾德 莫特時，她的父親Simon de Driby50歲，母親Alice Fitzhugh Greasley38歲。她於1289年與Robert de Kirkton在英國林可爾史爾林肯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Driby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Riby (Lincs) or perhaps Ribby (Lancs); on the latter name,  see also  Rigby  . See also   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames  .

variants.name: Rigby
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames
meanings: English: locative name  see  Hermitage  . The WR Yorks name is from a hermitage in South Crosland, close to Armitage Bridge (WR Yorks).   Redmonds, Dictionary of Yorks Surnames   notes that the hermitage was built on land granted in a 13th-century charter to the Knights Templar, and that the first known bearer of the surname was Adam del Hermitage of Crosland (1340).

nameMeanings.name: Beatrix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name, which was borne by a saint martyred in Rome, together with Saints Faustinus and Simplicius, in the early 4th century. The original form of the name was probably Viatrix, a feminine version of Viator ‘voyager (through life)’, which was a favourite name among early Christians. This was then altered by association with Latin Beatus ‘blessed’ (Via- and Bea- sometimes being pronounced the same in Late Latin). See also Beatrice .

en.lifeSummary: When Beatrix Driby was born about 1275, in Stratfield Mortimer, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Simon de Driby, was 50 and her mother, Alice Fitzhugh Greasley, was 38. She married Robert de Kirkton in 1289, in Lincoln, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

ja.lifeSummary: Beatrix Dribyが約1275年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアストラトフィールド モーティマーで生まれた時，父Simon de Dribyは50歳，母Alice Fitzhugh Greasleyは38歳であった。1289年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリンコルンでRobert de Kirktonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Beatrix Driby(이)가 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 스트라트필드 모르팀어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Simon de Driby(은)는 50세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Fitzhugh Greasley(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1289년 영국 링코실르 링코컨에서 Robert de Kirkton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Beatrix Driby родилась около 1275 г. в местности стратфиелд мортимир, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Simon de Driby было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Fitzhugh Greasley, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Kirkton в 1289 г. в местности линколн, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.
